src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_258: Hurls sludge at the\nfoe. It may poison\nthe foe.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_259: Causes a sandstorm\nthat hits the foe\nover several turns.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_260: A powerful fire\nattack that may\nburn the foe.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_261: Stops the foe from\nmoving with rocks.\nMay lower SPEED.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_262: An extremely fast\nattack that can't\nbe avoided.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_263: Prevents the foe\nfrom using the same\nmove in a row.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_265: Adds an effect to\nattack depending\non the location.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_266: The user sleeps for\n2 turns to restore\nhealth and status.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_267: Makes it tough to\nattack a foe of the\nopposite gender.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_268: While attacking,\nit may steal the\nfoe's held item.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_269: Spreads hard-edged\nwings and slams\ninto the foe.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_270: Switches abilities\nwith the foe on the\nturn this is used.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_271: Steals the effects\nof the move the foe\nis trying to use.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_272: Enables full-power\nattack, but sharply\nlowers SP. ATK.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_273: Attacks the foe\nwith sharp blades\nor claws.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_274: Flies up on the\nfirst turn, then\nattacks next turn.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_275: Creates a huge\nwave, then crashes\nit down on the foe.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_277: Looses a powerful\nblast of light that\nreduces accuracy.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_278: A rock-crushingly\ntough attack that\nmay lower DEFENSE.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_279: Attacks the foe\nwith enough power\nto climb waterfalls.
src_data_item_descriptions_en.h.string_280: Dives underwater\nthe 1st turn, then\nattacks next turn.
